station.name: STATION_01_Loading
station.catalogue_reference: VEKIFAB Rexroth-style kitting bench, 1.6 m, aluminium 40x40 profile system

conventions.offset_reference: All component offset_m are [dx, dy, dz] relative to station.world_position at floor level; dz is absolute height. Every node uses offset_m (absolute) so parented sub-assemblies are not distorted by parent box scaling.
conventions.design_notes: 40x40 anodised aluminium extrusion frame on levelling feet; ESD laminate worktop; angled bin rail; powered roller outfeed with gearmotor; RAL-grey control cabinet; Festo-style FRL; igus-style energy chain. No visible fasteners on operator (+Y) show faces; service hardware on -X/rear.

body.text: Loading Station: incoming components are kitted onto trays and released onto the line.
